ast.name: title
ast.source: Advance all notes in this section by 1 day
ast.target: 将此部分中的所有笔记提前 1 天

ast.name: title
ast.source: Postpone all notes in this section by 1 day
ast.target: 将此部分中的所有笔记推迟 1 天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default algorithm for newly created notes.
ast.target: 选择新创建笔记的默认算法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Desired recall probability (0.7-0.99, default: 0.9). Higher values mean more frequent reviews.
ast.target: 期望的回忆概率（0.7-0.99，默认值：0.9）。值越高意味着复习越频繁。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated initial learning intervals in minutes (e.g., 1,10 for 1m, 10m).
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的初始学习间隔（以分钟为单位）（例如，1,10 表示 1 分钟，10 分钟）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between list or calendar for the review sidebar
ast.target: 选择复习侧边栏使用列表或日历视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display notifications when moving between notes
ast.target: 在笔记间导航时显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When adding a folder to review, include all notes in subfolders
ast.target: 将文件夹添加到复习时，包含子文件夹中的所有笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minutes before due time to notify about upcoming reviews (0 to disable)
ast.target: 在到期前多少分钟提醒即将到来的复习（设为0可禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Words per minute for estimating review time
ast.target: 用于估算复习时间的每分钟阅读字数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Execute a command with a slight delay after navigating to the next or previous note.
ast.target: 导航到下一个或上一个笔记后，以轻微延迟执行命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click the button and press the desired hotkey.
ast.target: 点击按钮并按下所需的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before executing the command after navigation.
ast.target: 导航后执行命令前的等待时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use AI-generated multiple-choice questions to test your knowledge
ast.target: 使用AI生成的多项选择题来测试你的知识

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the API provider for generating MCQs.
ast.target: 选择用于生成多项选择题的API提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for generating MCQs via OpenRouter.
ast.target: 通过OpenRouter生成多项选择题所必需。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of your running Ollama instance (e.g., http://localhost:11434)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 来自Together AI的模型标识符（例如，meta-llama/Llama-4-Maverick-17B-128E-Instruct-FP8）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model name to use (e.g., gpt-4, local-model-name)
ast.target: 要使用的模型名称（例如，gpt-4, local-model-name）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to determine the number of questions per note.
ast.target: 如何确定每个笔记的问题数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of questions to generate for each note.
ast.target: 为每个笔记生成的问题数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate approximately 1 question for every X words in the note.
ast.target: 大约每X个字生成1个问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of answer choices for each question

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply penalty after this many seconds

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically regenerate questions for a note if its review rating meets or exceeds a specified value.
ast.target: 如果笔记的复习评分达到或超过指定值，则自动为其重新生成问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of work sessions before a long break starts.
ast.target: 在长休息开始前的工作时段数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Play a sound at the end of each work/break session.
ast.target: 在每个工作/休息时段结束时播放声音。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A data file exists at the default location. You can safely delete it or keep it as a backup.
ast.target: 默认位置存在一个数据文件。你可以安全地删除它或将其保留为备份。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Deduct full mark on first failure

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用按评分重新生成问题

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 OpenRouter API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入 OpenRouter 模型标识符

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 OpenAI API 密钥 (sk-...)

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入 OpenAI 模型名称

ast.name: setText
ast.source: All caught up! No notes due for review.
ast.target: 全部完成！没有待复习的笔记。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Error: could not render list view. Renderer not ready.
ast.target: 错误：无法渲染列表视图。渲染器未就绪。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Error: could not render calendar view. CalendarView not ready.
ast.target: 错误：无法渲染日历视图。CalendarView 未就绪。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Get your API key at https://openrouter.ai/keys
ast.target: 在 https://openrouter.ai/keys 获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Add note's folder to review schedule
ast.target: 将笔记所在文件夹添加到复习计划

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Spaceforge: Backup recovery failed, using defaults:
ast.target: Spaceforge：备份恢复失败，使用默认值：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Feature could not be initialized. Please check settings.
ast.target: 功能无法初始化。请检查设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No notes due for review today!
ast.target: 今天没有待复习的笔记！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Note is not eligible to be advanced.
ast.target: 该笔记不符合提前复习的条件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Review postponed to tomorrow. Note will be easier to recover with a small penalty applied.
ast.target: 复习已推迟至明天。笔记将更容易恢复，但会施加一个小惩罚。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All caught up! No more notes due for review.
ast.target: 全部完成！没有更多待复习的笔记了。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid question data. Moving to next question.
ast.target: 问题数据无效。跳至下一题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Incorrect answer. Try again to proceed to the next question.
ast.target: 答案错误。请再试一次以进入下一题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not generate any MCQs. Falling back to manual review.
ast.target: 无法生成任何选择题。回退到手动复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error showing review. Falling back to manual review.
ast.target: 显示复习时出错。回退到手动复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Controller not available. Falling back to manual review.
ast.target: 控制器不可用。回退到手动复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Controller not available, falling back to manual review.
ast.target: 控制器不可用，回退到手动复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No notes due for review today.
ast.target: 今天没有待复习的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未选择任何笔记进行复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selected notes are not currently due for review.
ast.target: 所选笔记当前无需复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Preparing all MCQs. This may take a moment...
ast.target: 正在准备所有选择题。这可能需要一点时间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Questions feature not initialized. Check settings.
ast.target: 问题功能未初始化。请检查设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未选择要提前复习的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有符合条件的笔记被提前复习。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find note file to regenerate MCQs.
ast.target: 找不到要重新生成选择题的笔记文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Generation service is not available. Check API provider settings.
ast.target: 生成服务不可用。请检查 API 提供商设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Questions flagged for regeneration. Generating new set...
ast.target: 问题已标记为重新生成。正在生成新题目...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to regenerate. Using existing set if available.
ast.target: 重新生成失败。如果可用，将使用现有题目。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No questions found. Generating new set...
ast.target: 未找到问题。正在生成新题目...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error starting review. Please check console for details.
ast.target: 启动复习时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Feature is disabled or the generation service is not available. Check API provider settings.
ast.target: 功能已禁用或生成服务不可用。请检查 API 提供商设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Using recently generated MCQs for this note.
ast.target: 正在使用为此笔记最近生成的选择题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot generate MCQs: file not found
ast.target: 无法生成选择题：文件未找到

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 选择题已成功生成并保存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No notes due for review on the selected date.
ast.target: 所选日期没有待复习的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No questions available for the due notes.
ast.target: 待复习笔记没有可用的问题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: parent is not a folder.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Markdown files found in folder.
ast.target: 文件夹中未找到 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error adding folder to review schedule
ast.target: 将文件夹添加到复习计划时出错

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在分析文件夹结构和链接...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No files found for review in this folder.
ast.target: 此文件夹中未找到用于复习的文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid durations. Settings not saved. Please enter positive numbers.
ast.target: 持续时间无效。设置未保存。请输入正数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill in all required fields

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Switched to list view. Sidebar will update.
ast.target: 已切换到列表视图。侧边栏将更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All data imported successfully. Plugin may require a reload for all changes to take effect.
ast.target: 所有数据导入成功。插件可能需要重新加载才能使所有更改生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有数据已重置为默认值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有复习数据已成功清除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to clear review data. Check console for details.
ast.target: 清除复习数据失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有日历事件已成功清除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to clear calendar events. Check console for details.
ast.target: 清除日历事件失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to clear all data. Check console for details.
ast.target: 清除所有数据失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Words per question must be a positive number.
ast.target: 每题单词数必须为正数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Legacy data file kept as backup. You can delete it manually when ready.
ast.target: 旧数据文件已作为备份保留。您可以在准备好后手动删除它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 旧数据文件已成功删除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate valid questions. Try again.
ast.target: 生成有效问题失败。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate questions. Check console for details.
ast.target: 生成问题失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only Markdown files can be added to review.
ast.target: 只有Markdown文件可以添加到复习中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 用于复习会话的文件夹无效

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No file selected in file explorer
ast.target: 文件资源管理器中未选择文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error loading data, using defaults to prevent crash
ast.target: 加载数据出错，使用默认值以防止崩溃

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Successfully saved to custom path, original data file kept as backup for safety
ast.target: 已成功保存到自定义路径，原始数据文件已作为备份保留以确保安全

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Data saved to default plugin folder due to error with custom path
ast.target: 由于自定义路径出错，数据已保存到默认插件文件夹

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Critical error: failed to save data to both custom and default locations
ast.target: 严重错误：无法将数据保存到自定义和默认位置

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error saving data. Check console for details
ast.target: 保存数据出错。请检查控制台获取详情

ast.source: No active Markdown file to review
ast.target: 没有活动的Markdown文件可供复习

ast.source: No active Markdown file to add to review
ast.target: 没有活动的Markdown文件可添加到复习

ast.target: 无法确定当前笔记的文件夹，没有活动文件，或父级不是文件夹

ast.target: 生成服务无法初始化。请在设置中检查API提供商设置

ast.target: 设置中未设置OpenRouter API密钥

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add selected file to review schedule (file explorer)
ast.target: 将选定的文件添加到复习计划（文件资源管理器）

ast.source: Add current note to review schedule
ast.target: 将当前笔记添加到复习计划

ast.target: 将当前笔记的文件夹添加到复习计划

ast.name: text
ast.source: No questions were answered in this session.
ast.target: 本次会话中没有回答任何问题。

ast.name: text
ast.target: （错误 - 使用了“显示答案”选项）

ast.name: text
ast.source: There was an error completing the session. Please try again.
ast.target: 完成会话时出错。请重试。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 仅使用覆盖时间（无笔记）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Both cases reset the repetition count to 1 and update the ease factor.
ast.target: 两种情况都会将重复次数重置为1并更新难度因子。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 降低稳定性，可能增加难度

ast.name: title
ast.source: Review the currently open note if it's due
ast.target: 如果当前打开的笔记已到期，则进行复习

ast.name: title
ast.target: 开始复习所有到期的笔记
